name: OpenIPAHound 23 Research - Trust And Replication
description: Shows AD trust context and replication-control relationships. IPA_TrustedBy and IPA_DCSync are non-traversable because hybrid AD/IPA paths and replication secret handling need separate validation.
query:
MATCH p=(source)-[edge:IPA_TrustedBy|IPA_DCSync]->(env:IPA_Environment)
RETURN p,
       coalesce(source.domain, source.cn, source.uid, source.principal, source.fqdn) AS source_name,
       env.domain AS freeipa_domain,
       type(edge) AS relationship_type
LIMIT 1000
